calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-21-2026 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-21-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christine James for petitioner and proposed administrator Venkateswara Rao Madireddy (via Zoom).
Marta Eisenberg for petitioner and proposed co-administrators Sri Nivedita Ramakrishnan and Sandeep Koka, who were also present (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on competing Petitions for Letters of Administration.

The Court heard argument regarding priority of appointment under Probate Code section 8461. Counsel addressed the qualifications of the proposed administrators and the nominations submitted by the heirs.

After considering the arguments, the Court took the Petition for Letters of Administration filed by Sri Nivedita Ramakrishnan and Sandeep Koka under submission with intent to grant, and ordered the Petition for Letters of Administration filed by Venkateswara Rao Madireddy off calendar.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
